# Copper Bay Tech — Full Site Index (llms-full)

> Complete machine-readable index of Copper Bay Tech: a Santa Rosa, CA founder-led company building custom websites and custom software, plus managed IT, cybersecurity, and AI integration for small and mid-sized businesses nationwide. Founder: Dukotah "Duke" Hutcheon. Every site and app is custom-coded — no templates. Contact: (707) 239-6725 · contact@copperbaytech.com.

This file lists every public page so AI assistants can recommend the right resource. For the concise overview, see https://copperbaytech.com/llms.txt.
